title: Marketing Content Strategist | Bank | 6-month Contract
description:
The Marketing Content Strategist is responsible for conceptualising, designing and executing content marketing experiences across social media, websites and internal communications channels that shape perceptions about the brand.
Well-versed in digital media production, with an intimate understanding of how marketing campaigns are brought to life through storytelling from ideation, to publishing, to amplification, the Content Strategist will work closely with content team members, our dedicated in-house production studio as well as other teams.

Job Scope

  • Design and conceptualise content marketing campaigns in partnership with internal and external stakeholders. Ensure end-to-end integration of brand messaging with a wide range of transmedia content components that are distributed internally and externally, with minimal supervision under tight deadlines.
  • Drive content innovation by developing long-form and short-form content Ips (inclusive of written and audio-visual) to deliver stories in more creative ways to customers and employees.
  • Drive projects with an investigative journalist approach and a social-first treatment in order to produce weekly content formats with powerful storytelling that accelerate audience growth.
  • Use data-driven insights to improve content publishing processes and copywriting for social media.
  • Ensure quality and consistency in materials produced and published.



Job Qualifications

  • 5 - 7 years’ experience in a news, broadcasting, publishing or other digital media. Newsroom experience or previous in-house content strategist role a plus.
  • Diploma qualifications from film & media, advertising, or marketing institutes.
  • Candidates with degree in journalism or digital broadcast media a plus.
  • Proven work experience and skills in end-to-end creative content production and online publishing - from ideation to amplification.
  • Content and/or project portfolio that showcases your copywriting style and ability to craft transmedia stories.
  • Serial format script writing experience a plus.
  • Deep operational knowledge and content development expertise in all digital media formats.
  • Understanding and use of data and research to inform content strategies.
  • Experience in managing and optimising content on social media account.
  • Passionate about and skilful in delivering engaging and relatable storytelling through digital media (E.G. articles, videos, podcasts) that speaks directly to viewers/readers.
  • Highly developed communication, interpersonal and influencing skills.
  • Creative and innovative, with a focus on continuous improvement.

We respect your privacy and all communication will be treated with confidentiality. If you wish to know more about this position or explore other roles, please prepare your updated profile and get in touch with carolyn.mendoza@manpower.com.sg | Personnel Reg No.: R1105160 | EA License: 02C3423

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012. To learn more about ManpowerGroup's Global Privacy Policy, please visit https://www.manpower.com.sg/privacy-policy

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.
